steps.title: Two language settings on AhaSlides
steps.description: AhaSlides gives you two separate language controls: the presenter interface language (your menus and buttons), and the audience display language (what participants see). Let's set both.

steps.title: Click the globe icon to open the language menu
steps.description: Click the globe icon in the top bar to open the presenter interface language picker. You'll see a list of all 27 supported languages.

action.hint: Click the globe icon to open the language menu

steps.title: Presenter interface language — 27 options
steps.description: The presenter language list opens below the globe button. Choose from 27 languages — the interface switches instantly.

mainInteractions.label: inject fake presenter language dropdown
mainInteractions.js: var existing = document.getElementById('fake-presenter-lang-dropdown'); if (existing) existing.remove(); var btn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="multiple-language-trigger-button"]'); var btnRect = btn ? btn.getBoundingClientRect() : {right: 1090, bottom: 50, left: 1050}; var W = window.innerWidth; var languages = ['Čeština','Deutsch','English ✓','Español','Français','Hrvatski','Íslenska','Italiano','Latviešu','Lietuvių','Magyar','Nederlands','Norsk','Polski','Português','Română','Shqip','Slovenčina','Srpski (Latinica)','Srpski (Ćirilica)','Tiếng Việt','Български','Ελληνικά','Русский','中文','日本語','한국어']; var panel = document.createElement('div'); panel.id = 'fake-presenter-lang-dropdown'; var col1 = document.createElement('div'); var col2 = document.createElement('div'); col1.style.cssText = 'min-width:150px;border-right:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.06);'; col2.style.cssText = 'min-width:150px;'; var half = Math.ceil(languages.length/2); languages.forEach(function(lang,i){ var col = i < half ? col1 : col2; var item = document.createElement('div'); item.style.cssText = 'padding:6px 14px;color:rgba(0,0,0,0.88);white-space:nowrap;line-height:1.4;font-size:13px;'; if(lang.indexOf('English')>=0){ item.style.background='#f5f0ff'; item.style.color='#6247aa'; item.style.fontWeight='600'; } item.textContent = lang; col.appendChild(item); }); panel.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:8px;right:4px;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.22),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);z-index:2147483647;padding:4px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:13px;pointer-events:none;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:row;'; panel.appendChild(col1); panel.appendChild(col2); document.body.appendChild(panel);

steps.title: Now set the audience language
steps.description: The audience display language is found inside each presentation's Settings — it controls what participants see on their devices. Let's open a presentation.

steps.title: Add a slide to get started
steps.description: Every presentation can have its own audience display language. Add a Poll slide — then we'll head straight to the language settings.

action.hint: Click Poll to add a slide

steps.title: Slide added — heading to Settings
steps.description: The Poll slide is in your deck. Now let's open Settings to choose the audience display language.

steps.title: Open the presentation Settings
steps.description: Click the Settings icon in the right panel. This is where you control the audience display language for this presentation.

action.hint: Click Settings to open the settings panel

steps.title: Settings panel is loading
steps.description: The Settings panel is opening — here you control how this presentation behaves for your audience.

steps.title: Go to Presentation language
steps.description: In the Settings panel, click Presentation language in the left menu to reach the audience language picker.

action.hint: Click Presentation language in the menu

steps.title: Audience display language — 32 languages
steps.description: This is the audience language dropdown. AhaSlides supports 32 audience languages — from Bahasa Indonesia and Čeština to 中文 and 日本語. English is selected by default.

mainInteractions.label: inject fake audience language list below select
mainInteractions.js: var existing = document.getElementById('fake-audience-lang-list'); if (existing) existing.remove(); var sel = document.querySelector('[data-testid="presentation-settings-language-select"]'); if (!sel) return; var selRect = sel.getBoundingClientRect(); var audiences = ['Bahasa Indonesia','Čeština','Dansk','Deutsch','English','Español','Français','Hrvatski','Italiano','Latviešu','Lietuvių','Magyar','Nederlands','Norsk','Polski','Português (Brasil)','Português (Portugal)','Română','Shqip','Slovenčina','Srpski (Latinica)','Srpski (Ćirilica)','Suomi','Svenska','Tiếng Việt','Türkçe','Ελληνικά','Български','Русский','中文','日本語','한국어']; var panel = document.createElement('div'); panel.id = 'fake-audience-lang-list'; var colCount = 2; var perCol = Math.ceil(audiences.length / colCount); panel.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:' + (Math.round(selRect.bottom) + 4) + 'px;left:' + Math.round(selRect.left) + 'px;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18),0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);z-index:2147483647;padding:6px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:13px;pointer-events:none;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:row;'; for (var c = 0; c < colCount; c++) { var col = document.createElement('div'); col.style.cssText = 'min-width:160px;padding:0 2px;'; var slice = audiences.slice(c * perCol, (c+1)*perCol); slice.forEach(function(lang){ var item = document.createElement('div'); item.style.cssText = 'padding:5px 14px;color:rgba(0,0,0,0.88);white-space:nowrap;line-height:1.4;font-size:13px;'; if(lang==='English'){ item.style.background='#f5f0ff'; item.style.color='#6247aa'; item.style.fontWeight='600'; } item.textContent = lang; col.appendChild(item); }); panel.appendChild(col); } document.body.appendChild(panel);

steps.title: Choosing Español for the audience
steps.description: Let's select Spanish — Español — for this presentation. All participant-facing text switches to Spanish immediately.

mainInteractions.label: remove fake audience list before selecting

steps.title: Español set — close Settings
steps.description: The audience language is saved to Español automatically. Click the X to close Settings and return to the editor.

action.hint: Click X to close the Settings modal

steps.title: Preview — see the audience view in Spanish
steps.description: Click Preview to see exactly what Spanish-speaking participants will see on their devices.

steps.title: Audience view in Español
steps.description: Your audience sees AhaSlides in Spanish — the join screen, buttons, and navigation all appear in Español on participants' devices.

steps.title: All set!
steps.description: Both language settings are saved automatically. Combine the presenter interface language with the audience display language to run fully multilingual sessions.
